body.title: Move CC dev skills into repo, install via uu bootstrap
body.result: skills already in repo; cleaned all 16 files with TheIgors refs; added uu bootstrap --skills install command
body.description:
Dev skills (/sprint, /sorted, /sprint-ticket, etc.) currently live at ~/.claude/skills/ outside version control — they cannot be shared, versioned, or contributed to. They should live in skills/ within this repo and be installed at bootstrap time.

Shape: skills/ directory at repo root mirrors ~/.claude/skills/ structure. uu bootstrap --skills symlinks or copies them to ~/.claude/skills/. New contributors get the full skill set by running uu bootstrap.

Secondary: rename internal jargon in skill content — theigors/rules/*, cc-minion references, etc. should use unseenuniversity/ paths.

**Affected files:** skills/ (new dir), uu (bootstrap subcommand), ~/.claude/skills/ (install target)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; skills are plain markdown files — no DB dependency; install is idempotent
**Scope boundary:** IN: skills/ directory in repo; uu bootstrap --skills install; rename theigors/ refs in skill content to unseenuniversity/. OUT: changing skill logic/behavior, palace namespace rename (separate ticket)
**Completion criteria:** git clone + uu bootstrap --skills installs all skills to ~/.claude/skills/; no skill file contains theigors/ or .TheIgors references
